product_overview: A backend API for managing authenticated users, sites, locales, pages, and media assets for a content management workflow. It supports locale-aware content resolution, page revision restoration, route generation, and public media delivery.
core_goals: Provide secure JWT-based authentication for administrative access
Enable CRUD management of sites, locales, pages, and media
Support locale-aware content creation and updates with merged layout resolution
Generate and restore page revisions to support content versioning
Serve public media files with upload, metadata, and thumbnail support

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Expose a simple endpoint to verify the API service is running.
user_flows: GET /health -> Receive 200 with {"status":"ok"}
GET /health on an unavailable service -> Receive no 200 response and the client detects service failure

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allow users to register, log in, and fetch the current authenticated user using JWT tokens.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/register with valid email and password -> Receive 201 with JWT token and user object -> GET /api/me with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with current user profile
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token and user object -> GET /api/me with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with authenticated user data
POST /api/auth/register with an already existing email -> Receive 409 conflict indicating email already exists
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 unauthorized indicating invalid credentials
GET /api/me without a Bearer token or with an invalid/expired token -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Sites Management
features.description: Create, view, update, publish, and delete sites with locale-aware options and lifecycle controls.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/sites with valid name, unique domain, options, and locales -> Receive 201 with created site and default pages/locales -> GET /api/sites/:id -> Receive 200 with site details and locale-resolved options
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/sites?limit=20&filter[name]=brand -> Receive 200 with a paginated filtered list of sites
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> PUT /api/sites/:id?locale=en with updated name/domain/options -> Receive 200 with updated site
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> PUT /api/sites/:id/live -> Receive 200 with site object and active live status
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> DELETE /api/sites/:id -> Receive 204 no content
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/sites with empty name or domain -> Receive 400 invalid body
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/sites with a duplicate domain -> Receive 409 domain already exists
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/sites/:id for a missing site -> Receive 404 site not found

features.name: Site Locales
features.description: Add and remove locales for a site, including cascading cleanup when locales are removed.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/sites/:id/locales with locale code ca and is_default false -> Receive 201 with created locale object
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> DELETE /api/sites/:id/locales/ca -> Receive 204 no content
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/sites/:id/locales with duplicate locale code -> Receive 409 duplicate locale code
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> DELETE /api/sites/:id/locales/xx -> Receive 404 site or locale not found

features.name: Pages Management
features.description: Create, inspect, update, delete, and restore pages/posts with locale-resolved layouts, SEO, slugs, and revisions.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/sites/:id/pages?locale=en with type page, slugs, and layout -> Receive 201 with created page and resolved layout
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/sites/:id/pages?limit=20&filter[type]=page -> Receive 200 with paginated page list
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/sites/:id/pages/:pageId?locale=en -> Receive 200 with page data and resolved layout
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> PUT /api/sites/:id/pages/:pageId?locale=en with updated layout, SEO, and slugs -> Receive 200 with updated page
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> DELETE /api/sites/:id/pages/:pageId -> Receive 204 no content
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/sites/:id/pages/:pageId/revisions -> Receive 200 with paginated revisions
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/sites/:id/pages/:pageId/revisions/:revisionId/restore?locale=en -> Receive 200 with page restored from revision
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/sites/:id/routes -> Receive 200 with locale-based routes map
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/sites/:id/sections/next-id -> Receive 200 with next unique section ID
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/sites/:id/blocks/next-id -> Receive 200 with next unique block ID
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/sites/:id/pages?locale=en with missing slugs or mismatched locale -> Receive 400 invalid request
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/sites/:id/pages/:pageId?locale=en for a missing page -> Receive 404 page not found

features.name: Media Management
features.description: Upload, browse, inspect, delete, and publicly serve media files with automatic thumbnail generation.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/media with a valid image file -> Receive 201 with media object, URL, and thumbnail URL
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/media?limit=20&filter[filename]=logo -> Receive 200 with paginated media list
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/media/:id -> Receive 200 with media metadata
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> DELETE /api/media/:id -> Receive 204 no content
GET /media/:name without authentication -> Receive 200 with the binary media file
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/media without a file or with an invalid MIME type -> Receive 400 invalid file upload
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/media/:id for a missing media record -> Receive 404 media not found
GET /media/:name for a missing file -> Receive 404 file not found

endpoints.description: Health check

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User registration and login with JWT tokens

endpoints.description: Register new user

response_schema.400: Email or password empty, password < 8 chars

endpoints.description: Login user
Get current authenticated user

features.name: Sites Management
features.description: CRUD operations for sites with locales, layout options, and live status

endpoints.description: Create site with default pages and locales

body.name: string (required)
body.locales: array (required, min 1 item with code and is_default)

response_schema.201: Site with locales and auto-created pages
response_schema.400: Invalid body, empty name/domain, empty locales, duplicate locale codes

endpoints.description: List sites (paginated, filterable)

response_schema.200: Paginated list of sites with locales

endpoints.description: Get site with locale-resolved options

query.locale: string (optional, defaults to site default locale)

response_schema.200: Site with resolved options and routes

endpoints.description: Update site (locale required for layout merge)

response_schema.409: Domain already exists on another site

endpoints.description: Set site as live (deactivates previous live site, regenerates pages)
Delete site and all related data (cascade)
Add locale to site
Remove locale from site (cascade deletes related data)

features.name: Pages Management
features.description: CRUD for pages and posts within a site with layout, SEO, slugs, and revisions

endpoints.description: Create page or post with layout, SEO, and slugs

response_schema.400: Invalid type, missing slugs, locale mismatch

endpoints.description: List pages (paginated, filterable by type, parent_id, blog_id, published_at)
Get page with locale-resolved layout
Update page layout, SEO, slugs (locale merge)
Delete page and all children (cascade)
List page revisions (paginated)
Restore a page revision
Get all routes for vue-router
Get next unique section ID for site
Get next unique block ID for site

features.name: Media Management
features.description: Upload, list, get, delete media files with auto thumbnail generation

endpoints.description: Upload media file (jpeg, png, gif, webp, svg)

response_schema.201: Media object with url and thumbnail_url
response_schema.400: No file or invalid MIME type

endpoints.description: List media (paginated, filterable by id, filename, mime_type)
Get media metadata by ID
Delete media and files from disk
Serve media file (public, no auth required)
